Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Zakareth]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== House of Blades ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 3''' — Zakareth is the King.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 4''' — Zakareth is the King of Damasca.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 14''' — Zakareth is a figure whose will the Damascan soldiers extend.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 15''' — Zakareth has a Territory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 16''' — Alin intends to oppose Zakareth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 23''' — Zakareth has a red eye that may allow him to see into minds.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 1''' — Zakareth is a figure Indirial would tell to send slaves.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 5''' — Zakareth is a ruler whose rule might end if Valinhall joined against Damasca.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 15''' — Zakareth's crown has a ruby that can flare.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 16''' — Zakareth values the blood of Ragnarus Travelers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 16''' — Zakareth is with the army.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 23''' — Zakareth's price for his strength was his life.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 23''' — Zakareth's weapon is a spear.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 25''' — Zakareth has a pale and sunken face with an empty eye socket covered by an eyepatch.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 2''' — Zakareth's son is Talos.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 2''' — Zakareth is a character who was unaware of the Pillar of Sunset's existence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 11''' — Zakareth stands atop his palace and watches the people.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 15''' — Zakareth faced the gates of Cana with the Incarnations of Helgard and Lirial behind him.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 17''' — Zakareth wears a tall, spiked crown and grips a ruby-headed staff.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 17''' — Zakareth's left eye is composed of swirling crimson flames and his right eye has turned red.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 17''' — Zakareth's skin has patterns of red and gold that glow softly.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 17''' — Zakareth's steel and Nye essence were completely out.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 17''' — Zakareth has chains wrapped almost all the way around his shoulders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 17''' — Zakareth fears transforming into another Incarnation and threatening his family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 19''' — Zakareth wants Indirial to become an Incarnation so he can control him with the Rod.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 20''' — Zakareth has ruby and gold swirls on his skin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 21''' — Zakareth felt an expression of Ragnarus power pulsing from the hill where Leah stood.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 22''' — Zakareth does not attack Simon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 24''' — Leah wishes Zakareth had died on the Vault floor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 25''' — Indirial was working for Zakareth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 25''' — King Zakareth is preparing to attack Enosh to destroy Alin and Elysia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 26''' — Zakareth is expected to lead with his Incarnations and an army.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Cynara mentioned Zakareth in relation to her power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Zakareth has fire in his left eye socket.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Zakareth believes he will return in three hundred or a thousand years.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Simon decapitated King Zakareth.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
